title: Slot Auction Humiliation
body: The market assigns a brutally honest price to the pieces you claimed were strategic.

title: Regional Feed Unravels
body: The hub closure leaves feeder traffic wandering the system like lost luggage with passengers attached.

title: Maintenance Paper Trail
body: Deferred line items become a chronological essay on intent.

title: FAA Ramp Audit
body: Inspectors arrive with clipboards, patience, and a very poor sense of humor.

title: Lessor Step-In Clause
body: The aircraft buyer remembers the contract includes rights that become active when you start looking fragile.

title: Lease Reserve True-Up
body: Cash saved on presentation day comes back as a less photogenic reserve call.

title: Covenant Leak
body: Someone passes the lender terms to the press and the missing adjectives are not flattering.

title: Distressed Debt Pack Hunt
body: The friendliest creditors sell to the kind of fund that introduces itself with a deadline.

title: Reservation Cutover Stumble
body: The newly monetized booking stack misses a beat and suddenly every airport screen is arguing with yesterday.

title: Card Processor Reserve Call
body: The acquiring bank decides forward bookings look less like revenue and more like collateral it should hold itself.
